posts.title: Trump Signs Executive Order Designating JD Vance Anti-Fraud Task Force Chair. “This Will Not be Like a Kamala Where She Was Put in Charge of The Border”

link_metadata.description: President Trump on Monday signed an executive order to establish an anti-fraud task force, chaired by Vice President JD Vance, to investigate and root out the massive fraud in federally funded welfare programs across the country.  Trump announced during his State of the Union speech last month that Vance would lead his administration’s “war on fraud.” Federal Trade Commission Chairman Andrew Ferguson will serve as the task force’s Vice Chairman.
link_metadata.title: WATCH: Trump Signs Executive Order Designating JD Vance Anti-Fraud Task Force Chair, Roasts Border Czar Kamala Harris - "This Will Not be Like a Kamala Where She Was Put in Charge of The Border" | The Gateway Pundit | by Jordan Conradson

posts.author: rdvs34283
posts.title: Trump Signs Executive Order Designating JD Vance Anti-Fraud Task Force Chair. “This Will Not be Like a Kamala Where She Was Put in Charge of The Border”

link_metadata.description: President Trump on Monday signed an executive order to establish an anti-fraud task force, chaired by Vice President JD Vance, to investigate and root out the massive fraud in federally funded welfare programs across the country.  Trump announced during his State of the Union speech last month that Vance would lead his administration’s “war on fraud.” Federal Trade Commission Chairman Andrew Ferguson will serve as the task force’s Vice Chairman.
link_metadata.title: WATCH: Trump Signs Executive Order Designating JD Vance Anti-Fraud Task Force Chair, Roasts Border Czar Kamala Harris - "This Will Not be Like a Kamala Where She Was Put in Charge of The Border" | The Gateway Pundit | by Jordan Conradson
